creator: mandrews@bit0.com
text: Also p5-DBD-MariaDB is significantly slower.  I haven't done actual benchmarks/profiling to see why, but it slowed our (fairly high traffic) website down so much I ended up rolling back our Poudriere repo to March 21 and reverted back to the 4.x version of p5-DBD-mysql to get performance back to normal.
